HOW IT WORKS

Teach it your voice. Set your targets. Walk away.

From a short recording to fully autonomous outreach, GhostPost mirrors how you actually speak and act.

🎙

Record your voice

Speak naturally for two minutes. Whisper transcription and NLP extracts your vocabulary, tone, sentence patterns, and topics.

🔗

Connect accounts

Log into Instagram, LinkedIn, or X through the visible browser. Cookie sessions persist - no API keys or developer accounts.

🎯

Define targets

Pick verticals, locations, and message templates. GhostPost searches, qualifies leads, and queues personalised outreach.

👁

Watch or walk away

The browser streams live. Take control to solve CAPTCHAs or respond. Or close your laptop - GhostPost keeps working.

CAPABILITIES

Not a scheduler. Not a bot. A digital twin.

Designed to behave like you do, with observability and control built in.

🧠

Voice-learned personality

Your voice profile shapes every message - vocabulary, sentence length, punctuation habits, emoji usage, topics you gravitate to.

🖥

Visible browser

A real Chromium instance streams to your dashboard. Not headless. Not hidden. You see every click, scroll, and keystroke.

⏱

Circadian rhythm engine

Eight time-window personas model a real daily pattern - morning commute energy, post-lunch dip, evening wind-down.

✍️

Human typing simulation

Gaussian keystroke intervals. Occasional typos with backspace corrections. Bezier mouse curves with overshoot.

🛡

Anti-detection architecture

Stealth fingerprinting, residential proxy rotation, Poisson-distributed action timing. Built to pass ML behavioural analysis.

📊

Lead qualification

Built-in business vertical mapping with 70+ categories. Auto-classifies leads as target, conditional, or skip.

THE BRAIN

Four layers. One mind.
Indistinguishable from you.

GhostPost doesn't generate messages. It becomes you — through a neural architecture that learns, adapts, and behaves like a real human across every platform.

Observe

Scans timelines, tags, and profiles across X, Instagram, and LinkedIn in real-time

Understand

Scores relevance, qualifies leads, matches to your voice profile and current mood

Compose

Generates replies in your voice — vocabulary, rhythm, punctuation, tone — with circadian modulation

Deliver

Types with human imperfections, clicks with natural mouse curves, posts at believable intervals

LAYER 1

Voice DNA

Two minutes of you talking. That's all it takes. Whisper transcription extracts 620+ unique words, maps sentence rhythm, identifies signature phrases, and builds a complete linguistic fingerprint.

0words per minute
0avg sentence length
0unique words mapped
"honestly" "mate" "ship it" "solid" "reckon" "synergy" "leverage" "circle back"
Voice signature analysis
LAYER 2

Circadian Engine

You don't talk the same way at 7am and 11pm. Neither does GhostPost. Eight time-window personas model your daily rhythm — energy, tone, response length, and engagement style shift naturally throughout the day.

Work Mode 09:00 – 12:00 Professional · Articulate · Peak energy
85%
energy
LAYER 3

Emotional State

Some days you're sharp and witty. Other days you're quieter. GhostPost models daily mood variations, life event carry-over, and emotional drift — so your digital twin has bad days, great days, and everything in between.

Humour
7/10
Passion
9/10
Sarcasm
5/10
Supportive
7/10
Vulnerability
3/10
Reply composer
Replying to @paulg Work Mode · 85% energy
|
0 wpm composing...
LAYER 4

Human Simulation

The final layer makes it undetectable. Every keystroke follows Gaussian timing distributions. Mouse movements use Bezier curves with natural overshoot. Actions follow Poisson-distributed intervals. Occasional typos get backspaced and corrected — because real humans make mistakes.

Gaussian keystroke intervals
Bezier mouse curves
Poisson action timing
Deliberate typo correction
Stealth fingerprinting
Residential proxy rotation
Bezier curve with natural overshoot
Built on research by Golder & Macy · Barabási · Mark et al. · Dabbish & Kraut — behavioural authenticity modelled from peer-reviewed studies on human circadian patterns, typing dynamics, and online engagement rhythms.
WHY GHOSTPOST

The gap between you and a bot is everything
